info.name: vLLM Pool - Requested Prompt Sets
info.description: Async generation collection. /generate/chat and /generate/simple return 202 with {job_id,status}. Then call /jobs/{job_id} to fetch final result. Also includes /generate/offline examples for blocking/non-blocking behavior.

request.description: Chat request containing 100 prompt entries from your list.
Generate simple request for prompt set #2.

item.name: 3) Generate simple (You are an AI advisor...)

request.description: Generate simple request for prompt set #3.
Generate simple request for prompt set #4.

item.name: 5) Generate simple (You are an AI assistant...)

request.description: Generate simple request for prompt set #5.
Generate simple request for prompt set #6 (You are an assistant...).
Poll this endpoint after enqueueing /generate/chat or /generate/simple. Returns done+result, error, or queued/running.

item.name: 8) Offline blocking chat (returns result in same response)

request.description: No x-ui-request header => server blocks until done/error and returns final payload.
